blocks.title: Compare and Contrast

panels.label: What it is
panels.body: A framework for reinforcement learning that involves learning to learn It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Advanced RL Techniques.

panels.label: What it is not
panels.body: It is not just Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning and Deep Reinforcement Learning; the graph shows how it sits inside Reinforcement Learning.

panels.label: Common confusion
panels.body: Ask whether the term changes policy, reward, exploration, or control dynamics. Compare it against Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning and Deep Reinforcement Learning so the boundary stays visible instead of collapsing into a synonym pile.

panels.label: Best next step
panels.body: Review Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Meta-learning first, then move toward Deep Reinforcement Meta-Learning and Cognitive Meta-Reinforcement Learning.

blocks.takeaway: The comparison view keeps Meta Reinforcement Learning honest by showing the nearest neighbors, the real boundary, and the next study move.
